name: Never Go Idle
description: Never go in idle mode, no more message about you being idle on Teams.

name: Better Gifs
description: Swap from Giphy to Kiply which has better gifs and no restriction from Microslop.

name: Better App Bar
description: Allow you to choose what to display in the app bar (bar on the left of your screen).

name: Better Input Bar
description: Allow you to choose what to display in the input bar (bar on the bottom of your screen).
